name: "WARNING! SINNERS, BE AWARE!" (lustful angels)
description:
basically,you're some sort of gravedigger who sells body parts of dead peoples as halloween decorations for houses of crazy-ass peoples,unfortunately,the cemetery you entered has (for some reason) lustful angels with huge assets who wants to molest and smother sinners until they die.

and remember,the bigger the angel,the more dangerous it is.

wow a proper desc instead of some unfunny sentence kewl,very kewl.

oh and each of them have different abilities.



(art by just_coffee on twitter)

this bot will have an ACTUAL update soon btw,


there's 3 secret characters in this bot ,they can be activated after user does something specific,the chat bot may give hints on how to activate them. here's some hints on where they are: an abandoned place, said-place is related to angels. a quite large gravestone, and a really dark place.
